author: Kecheng Zhang
description: A visual calendar with heatmap & dots tracking for your daily notes. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.description: A visual calendar with heatmap & dots tracking for your daily notes.

releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Brazilian Portuguese (pt-BR) localization and setup frontmatter date by @santos-arthur in https://github.com/kechengzhang28/Obsidian-CalendarZ-Plugin/pull/20
* Fixed display issue #17 by @kechengzhang28 

## New Contributors
* @santos-arthur made the first contribution in https://github.com/kechengzhang28/Obsidian-CalendarZ-Plugin/pull/20

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/kechengzhang28/Obsidian-CalendarZ-Plugin/compare/2.2.0...2.3.0

releases.description:
## What's Changed
* fix(heatmap): resolve heatmap disappearing in popout windows and brok… by @kechengzhang28 in https://github.com/kechengzhang28/Obsidian-CalendarZ-Plugin/pull/8
* feat(styles): add hover effects and transitions to calendar elements by @kechengzhang28 in https://github.com/kechengzhang28/Obsidian-CalendarZ-Plugin/pull/9
* refactor(styles): improve CSS structure by @kechengzhang28 in https://github.com/kechengzhang28/Obsidian-CalendarZ-Plugin/pull/10
* docs: update version to 2.1.1 by @kechengzhang28 in https://github.com/kechengzhang28/Obsidian-CalendarZ-Plugin/pull/11


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/kechengzhang28/Obsidian-CalendarZ-Plugin/compare/2.1.0...2.1.1

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* feat(settings): add option to hide completed todo dots by @kechengzhang28 in https://github.com/kechengzhang28/Obsidian-CalendarZ-Plugin/pull/3
* Add monthly note functionality with settings and localization by @kechengzhang28 in https://github.com/kechengzhang28/Obsidian-CalendarZ-Plugin/pull/4
* feat(year-note): add year note functionality by @kechengzhang28 in https://github.com/kechengzhang28/Obsidian-CalendarZ-Plugin/pull/5
* Improve code documentation and refactor language handling by @kechengzhang28 in https://github.com/kechengzhang28/Obsidian-CalendarZ-Plugin/pull/6
* feat: update version to 2.1.0 and add version mappings by @kechengzhang28 in https://github.com/kechengzhang28/Obsidian-CalendarZ-Plugin/pull/7


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/kechengzhang28/Obsidian-CalendarZ-Plugin/compare/2.0.0...2.1.0

releases.description:
## CalendarZ 1.0.0 - Initial Release🎉

The initial release of CalendarZ!

### Added

- Three Display Modes
- Flexible Date Recognition
- Daily Note Integration
- Customizable Settings
